texto: As I sit, my back leaning against a damp, moss-covered tree trunk, my eyes sweeping the canopy above, my ears straining to catch the crack of a distant branch that betrays an orangutan moving in the treetops, I think about how we humans search for God. The tropical rain forest is the most complex thing an ordinary human can experience on this planet. A walk in the rain forest is a walk into the mind of God.
explicacao: Citação de Biruté M.F. Galdikas sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “As I sit, my back leaning against a damp, moss-covered tree trunk, my eyes sweeping the canopy ab…” articula reflexao, nature, primates em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e primates.
